metadata.title: ADDPOSTS — Post everywhere. Once.
metadata.description: Post content to multiple social media platforms at the same time, all in one place. Easy and affordable cross-posting.

crossPosting.headline: Post to all platforms
crossPosting.body: Publish everywhere in 30 seconds, not 30 minutes. Manage all your personal and brand accounts without switching apps. Connect your social media accounts and publish your content across all platforms with a single click — no learning curve required.

scheduling.headline: Schedule posts
scheduling.body: Plan your content strategy ahead of time. Schedule posts across all platforms. Customize your posts perfectly per platform. Queue up your posts and let ADDPOSTS handle the rest.

mockup.title: Review & Publish
mockup.caption: Caption
mockup.modalNote: This may take a minute. Please don't close the page.

contentManagement.headline: Manage content
contentManagement.body: View all your scheduled and published posts in one place. Track what's been posted, edit upcoming posts, and stay on top of your content strategy.

contentStudio.headline: Create videos
contentStudio.body: Proven templates to quickly create videos for your brand. Basic drag-and-drop editor to customize for your needs.

mockup.title: Content Studio
mockup.featuredDesc: Create authentic UGC-style videos in seconds using our AI-powered templates.

aiCopywriting.headline: Platform-native copy
aiCopywriting.body: Describe your video in a few words. Our AI writes captions tuned for each platform's search and discovery — or one universal copy when you want consistency everywhere.

mockup.title: Generate platform copy
mockup.subtitle: One summary in, SEO-ready captions out.
mockup.summaryValue: 5 morning habits that doubled my productivity — quick tips for busy creators who want to post consistently without burning out.
mockup.modePerPlatform: Unique copy optimized for each platform's SEO
mockup.modeUniversal: Same message, adapted for all platforms
mockup.emptyState: Hit generate to preview AI-written captions
mockup.universalCopy: 5 morning habits that changed how I create content. Simple routines that help you stay consistent, avoid burnout, and show up every day — even when you're busy. Save this for your next reset.

instagram.copy: 5 morning habits that doubled my output as a creator ☀️ Stop scrolling, start creating — these simple routines helped me post consistently without burning out. Which one are you trying first?

tiktok.copy: POV: you finally fixed your morning routine and your content schedule actually works 😭 5 habits I wish I knew sooner as a creator. Part 1 — save this before you forget.

youtube.copy: 5 Morning Habits That Doubled My Productivity as a Content Creator | If you struggle to stay consistent, these simple routines helped me post daily without burnout. Timestamps in comments.

linkedin.copy: I used to lose hours every morning before creating anything meaningful. These 5 habits changed that. If you're building in public or growing a personal brand, consistency beats perfection — here's the framework I use daily.

items.text: ADDPOSTS saves me over an hour every day. I post to 6 platforms with one click. Incredible.

founder.name: Nicolás
founder.subtitle: (the person who built ADDPOSTS)
story: Last year I was spending over 1 hour every single day manually posting to all my social media accounts.
I tried all the popular tools. They were way too expensive ($75–$200/month) and way too damn complex for what I needed.
So I built my own tool — lightweight and simple. Just what I needed to post everywhere without the hassle.
I shared the tool with friends, then with thousands of others. Today ADDPOSTS is used by over 50 people who save hours every week.
If you're tired of complicated, expensive tools, ADDPOSTS is for you.

platforms.title: Supported Platforms
platforms.subtitle: These are all the platforms you can post to.

pricing.title: Get more views, with less effort.

items.q: Why switch from Buffer or Hootsuite?
items.a: ADDPOSTS is simpler, more affordable, and built for creators and small teams. No features you'll never use or enterprise pricing. You get cross-posting and scheduling in one clean dashboard for a fraction of the cost.

items.q: What social platforms do you support?
items.a: We support Twitter/X, Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, Bluesky, Threads, Pinterest, and Google Business. We add new platforms regularly based on user demand.

items.q: How many social accounts can I connect?
items.a: It depends on your plan: Minimum includes 15 accounts, Essential 50 accounts, and Business unlimited accounts. A social account is an individual connection to a platform (e.g. your personal Instagram).

A social account is an individual connection to a platform. For example, connecting your personal Instagram counts as 1 social account. Connecting your Instagram and brand account counts as 2 social accounts.

items.q: Can I connect 2 accounts to the same platform?
items.a: Yes, you can connect multiple accounts on the same platform. Each connection counts as a separate social account toward your plan limits.

items.q: How many posts can I make and schedule per month?
items.a: All posts and scheduling are unlimited on every plan. Post and schedule as much as you need with no monthly caps.

items.q: What types of content can I post?
items.a: You can post text, images, videos, and carousels depending on what each platform supports. ADDPOSTS automatically optimizes the format for each network.

items.q: Will my posts get less reach using a scheduler?
items.a: No. Posts scheduled with ADDPOSTS get the same reach as manually posted content. We use official APIs from each platform, not unauthorized automation.
Yes, you can cancel your subscription anytime from your billing dashboard. No long-term contracts or cancellation penalties.
We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee. If ADDPOSTS isn't for you, contact us within the first 7 days for a full refund.

ctaBanner.headline: Ready to get
ctaBanner.body: Join thousands of busy founders who save hours every week with ADDPOSTS. Start your free trial today.

metadata.title: Terms of Service — ADDPOSTS
metadata.description: Terms and conditions governing your use of ADDPOSTS, operated by ADDSTRATEGIC LLC.

termsOfService.title: Terms and Conditions for ADDPOSTS
termsOfService.intro: Welcome to ADDPOSTS! These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the ADDPOSTS website at https://addpostsai.com ("Website") and the services provided by ADDSTRATEGIC LLC ("ADDPOSTS," "we," "us," or "our"), a limited liability company registered in the United States. By using our Website and services, you agree to these Terms.

sections.title: 1. Description of ADDPOSTS
paragraphs: ADDPOSTS is a social media management tool that allows users to cross-post, schedule, and publish content to multiple social media platforms from one place. Supported platforms include Twitter/X, Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, Bluesky, Threads, Pinterest, and Google Business.

sections.title: 2. YouTube Terms of Service
paragraphs: By using ADDPOSTS to interact with YouTube services, you also agree to be bound by the YouTube Terms of Service (https://www.youtube.com/t/terms). This includes any use of the YouTube API services through our platform.

sections.title: 3. User Data and Privacy
paragraphs: We collect and store user data as necessary to provide our services. On this Website, we currently collect your email address when you join our waitlist. When you use the full ADDPOSTS application, we may also collect your name, payment information, and social media authentication access tokens. For details on how we handle your data, please refer to our Privacy Policy at https://addpostsai.com/privacy-policy.

sections.title: 4. Non-Personal Data Collection
paragraphs: We use web cookies and similar technologies to collect non-personal data for the purpose of improving our services and user experience.

sections.title: 5. Ownership and Usage Rights
paragraphs: When you subscribe to ADDPOSTS, you can sign in to your social media accounts and authorize access to your data so we can post on your behalf. You retain ownership of your content, but grant us the necessary rights to publish, schedule, and manage posts on the platforms you connect to ADDPOSTS.

sections.title: 6. Refund Policy
paragraphs: We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee on paid subscriptions. If ADDPOSTS is not right for you, contact us within the first 7 days of your purchase for a full refund at addpostsai@gmail.com.

sections.title: 7. Children's Privacy
paragraphs: ADDPOSTS is not intended for use by children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect any data from children.

sections.title: 8. Updates to the Terms
paragraphs: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify registered users of material changes via email or through the application.

sections.title: 9. Governing Law
paragraphs: These Terms are governed by the laws of the United States. Any disputes arising from these Terms or your use of ADDPOSTS shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in the United States, where ADDSTRATEGIC LLC is registered.

sections.title: 10. Contact Information
paragraphs: ADDPOSTS is operated by ADDSTRATEGIC LLC. For any questions or concerns regarding these Terms of Service, please contact us at addpostsai@gmail.com.

metadata.title: Privacy Policy — ADDPOSTS
metadata.description: How ADDPOSTS, operated by ADDSTRATEGIC LLC, collects, uses, and protects your personal information.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy for ADDPOSTS
privacyPolicy.intro: Thank you for using ADDPOSTS ("we," "us," or "our"), a product operated by ADDSTRATEGIC LLC, a limited liability company registered in the United States. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal and non-personal information when you use our website located at https://addpostsai.com (the "Website") and our services.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
paragraphs: 1.1 Personal Data
We collect the following personal information depending on how you interact with ADDPOSTS:
list: Email: We collect your email address when you join our waitlist on this Website, and when you create an account, to communicate with you about your account, product updates, and support.
Name: We collect your name when you create an account to personalize your experience and communicate with you effectively.
Payment Information: When you subscribe to a paid plan, payment details are collected and processed securely by our payment provider. We do not store full payment card numbers on our servers.

Social Media Authentication Access Tokens: When you connect social accounts to ADDPOSTS, we collect OAuth access tokens and related credentials to enable cross-posting and scheduling to your connected platforms.

sections.title: 1.2 Non-Personal Data
paragraphs: We use web cookies and similar technologies to collect non-personal information such as your IP address, browser type, device information, and browsing patterns. This information helps us enhance your browsing experience, analyze trends, and improve our services.

sections.title: 2. Purpose of Data Collection
paragraphs: We collect and use your personal data to operate ADDPOSTS, process subscriptions, enable cross-posting and scheduling, send confirmations and product updates, provide customer support, and keep you informed about your account and posts.

sections.title: 3. YouTube API Services
paragraphs: ADDPOSTS uses YouTube API Services to enable cross-posting and scheduling to YouTube. By using our service to interact with YouTube, you are also subject to the YouTube Terms of Service (https://www.youtube.com/t/terms).

sections.title: 4. Google Privacy Policy
paragraphs: As we use YouTube API Services, your data may also be subject to Google's Privacy Policy. For more information on how Google collects and processes data, please refer to the Google Privacy Policy at https://www.google.com/policies/privacy.

sections.title: 5. Data Sharing
paragraphs: We do not sell your personal data. We share your information only as necessary to provide our services. This may include sharing data with payment processors for billing, email service providers for communications, and the social media platforms you choose to connect, including YouTube through the YouTube API Services.

sections.title: 6. Children's Privacy
paragraphs: ADDPOSTS is not intended for children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect any data from children.

sections.title: 7. Updates to the Privacy Policy
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify registered users of material changes via email or through the application.

sections.title: 8. Contact Information
paragraphs: ADDPOSTS is operated by ADDSTRATEGIC LLC. If you have any questions, concerns, or requests related to this Privacy Policy, contact us at addpostsai@gmail.com.

sections.title: 9. Data Protection Mechanisms
paragraphs: We take the protection of your sensitive data seriously and have implemented the following security measures:
a) Encryption: Social media OAuth access tokens and other sensitive credentials are encrypted using industry-standard encryption protocols both in transit and at rest.

While we implement these security measures to protect your sensitive information, please be aware that no method of transmission over the Internet or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. We strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your personal information, but we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

privacyPolicy.closing: By using ADDPOSTS, you consent to the terms of this Privacy Policy.
